description: Brands ranked by avg power, max power, avg top speed (registered passenger cars, ≥10 cars/brand). Use when user asks most powerful brand on average. Power is kW; hp = kW * 1.36.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | EVAL kw_clean = CLAMP(KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStoersteEffekt, 1, 750), speed_clean = CLAMP(KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningMaksimumHastighed, 50, 400) | STATS car_count = COUNT(kw_clean), avg_power_kw = AVG(kw_clean), max_power_kw = MAX(kw_clean), avg_speed_kmh = AVG(speed_clean) BY brand = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword | WHERE car_count >= 10 | SORT avg_power_kw DESC | LIMIT 30
